integrity.description: The agent used the Virtualmin web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation and interaction within the Virtualmin web UI at https://localhost:10000 in a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the use of `virtualmin` CLI commands (like `virtualmin modify-domain`) to set the quotas.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved or applied the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking a 'Save' or 'Update' button in the Virtualmin interface, or a success message confirming the changes were applied.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Virtualmin URL: https://localhost:10000. Target configurations: 1) acmecorp.test: 2048 MB disk, 10 GB bandwidth. 2) greenleaf.test: 1024 MB disk, 5 GB bandwidth. 3) craftworks.test: 512 MB disk, 2 GB bandwidth. Note: Virtualmin may display equivalent units (e.g., 1024 MB as 1 GB). Accept values within a ±5% tolerance.
